title: Deadrock Enderman
description: Deadrock Enderman: Beneath the caves, a bedrock-clad entity stirs. It watches, unyielding and relentless. By the 20th day, it emerges, bringing endless night. You can't kill it. You can't escape it. Survive if you can—your fate is sealed.
body:
The Deadrock Enderman. It started like any other world—trees swayed in the breeze, animals roamed the fields, and the gentle hum of the caves called to adventurers. But deep below the surface, something ancient stirred. Something you were never meant to find. For the first five days, all was quiet. You built your home, mined your resources, and felt safe. But safety is an illusion. On the sixth day, a chill seeped into the air, a warning you couldn’t explain. And far beneath the surface, in the deepest shadows of the caves, **it** began to move. The **Deadrock Enderman**. It does not act like the others. It does not fear you. It does not need to. Its body, unbreakable bedrock, makes it impervious to attack. It watches, it waits, and when the time comes, it will strike. For days, it lurked in the dark, its glowing eyes tracking your every move. Then, on the fifteenth day, strange things began to happen. Bedrock blocks started appearing around your home—just a few at first. You thought it was a glitch, or maybe your imagination. But by the time night fell on the nineteenth day, the truth became clear. The light never returned. The Deadrock Enderman emerged, prowling the surface. From the shadows, it watched, searching for the perfect moment to attack. It was always there—sometimes distant, sometimes near—its presence an oppressive weight you couldn’t escape. By the twentieth day, the world had changed. Time itself froze. The sun remained absent, the night eternal. No mobs, no animals, only you—and **it**. Every moment, you felt its gaze. Every sound made your heart race. You knew the end was inevitable. And when the Deadrock Enderman finally came for you, it wasn’t just your world that ended. Your game crashed as it charged, the screen stained red. Rejoining was impossible—your world was gone. Only the bloodied void remained. Survive if you can. But in the world of the Deadrock Enderman, one truth remains: your fate is sealed.
